connectorUiConfig.title: Airlock Digital connector (via Codeless Connector Framework)
connectorUiConfig.descriptionMarkdown: The Airlock Digital connector collects application control and execution logs from your Airlock Digital server, providing visibility into file executions, server activities, and security event summaries in Microsoft Sentinel.

dataTypes.name: AirlockDigitalServerActivities
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
AirlockDigitalServerActivities
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: AirlockDigitalExecutionHistories
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
AirlockDigitalExecutionHistories
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

dataTypes.name: AirlockDigitalFileActivitySummary
dataTypes.lastDataReceivedQuery:
AirlockDigitalFileActivitySummary
| where TimeGenerated > ago(6h)
| summarize Time = max(TimeGenerated)
| where isnotempty(Time)

resourceProvider.permissionsDisplayText: Read and Write permissions are required.

customs.name: Airlock Digital API Key
customs.description: API Key with read access to logging endpoints. Generate from Airlock Digital Web UI: User Menu > Settings > API Keys.

instructionSteps.title: 1. Configure Airlock Digital API Access
instructionSteps.description: Provide API connection details for Airlock Digital

parameters.content:
**Before you begin:**
- Access to your Airlock Digital server
- API Key from Airlock Digital (User Menu > Settings > API Keys)
- Server must be accessible from Azure (ensure firewall allows connections)

**Base URL:** Enter your Airlock Digital server URL. Default port is 3129 for REST API.
Example: `https://airlock.company.com:3129`

**The connector collects:**
- **Server Activities**: Administrative actions, policy changes, agent check-ins, and repository updates
- **Execution Histories**: File execution events including blocked, audited, and trusted executions with file hashes, publishers, and user details
- **File Activity Summary**: Aggregated statistics on file activity, security events, and execution trends

**Data refresh:** Logs are retrieved every 5 minutes. Data should appear within 5-10 minutes after connection.

instructionSteps.title: 2. Connect Airlock Digital servers to Microsoft Sentinel
instructionSteps.description: This connector supports multiple simultaneous connections. Add one connection per Airlock Digital server; each connection ingests the selected data types in parallel. Use the grid below to review existing connections or add a new one.

parameters.content:
## Connection details

Provide the Airlock Digital server URL and API key, then choose which data types to collect. Create a separate connection for each Airlock Digital server.

parameters.label: API Key
parameters.placeholder: Enter your Airlock Digital API Key
parameters.name: apiKey

parameters.label: Connector Friendly Name
parameters.placeholder: Enter a unique friendly name for this connection
parameters.name: friendlyName

parameters.text: The friendly name helps you identify this connection in the grid and in the collected data.
